name: 強勢護女父親
description: Scott Barkley在最關鍵時刻登場，用壓倒性的家族權勢為女兒撐腰。這種角色滿足了觀眾對「正義力量從天而降」的幻想。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Lay a hand on my only daughter and see what happens. ... Michelle is my pride and joy and she's the granddaughter of Jane Barkley, an heir to the Barkley Studios. Of course, you'd know that if you ever asked about her family.
examples.context: Scott Barkley在最關鍵時刻登場，用壓倒性的家族權勢為女兒撐腰。這種角色滿足了觀眾對「正義力量從天而降」的幻想。
